/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fno-common -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/root/myproject/adam/MaixPy-K210-STM32/linker/stm32f407_flash.ld -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=/root/myproject/adam/MaixPy-K210-STM32/build/rtthread/MaixPy_rtthread.map CMakeFiles/maix_hal_module.dir/startup/startup_stm32f407xx.s.obj CMakeFiles/maix_hal_module.dir/app/maix_runtime_app.c.obj CMakeFiles/maix_hal_module.dir/components/drivers/stm32/stm32_syscalls.c.obj -o MaixPy_rtthread.elf  components/drivers/stm32/libstm32_drivers.a rtos/librtthread_nano.a
